CreateAppBlbIpGroupProtocol.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string with a maximum length of 64 characters
CreateAppBlbIpGroupProtocol.ipGroupId: Identifier of the associated IP group
CreateAppBlbIpGroupProtocol.type: Protocol type exposed by the IP group: "TCP" / "HTTP" / "HTTPS" / "UDP"
CreateAppBlbIpGroupProtocol.healthCheck: Health check protocol type, defaults to the IP group protocol type; valid values: "TCP" / "HTTP" / "UDP" / "ICMP" / "HTTPS". Mapping between listener protocol (type) and health check protocol (healthCheck): TCP->TCP, UDP->UDP or ICMP, HTTP->TCP or HTTP, HTTPS->TCP, HTTP, or HTTPS
CreateAppBlbIpGroupProtocol.healthCheckPort: Health check port; required when the IP group protocol is HTTP
CreateAppBlbIpGroupProtocol.healthCheckUrlPath: Health check path; defaults to "/", effective when the health check protocol is "HTTP"
CreateAppBlbIpGroupProtocol.healthCheckTimeoutInSecond: Health check timeout in seconds; defaults to 3, must be an integer between 1 and 60
CreateAppBlbIpGroupProtocol.healthCheckIntervalInSecond: Health check interval in seconds; defaults to 3, must be an integer between 1 and 10
CreateAppBlbIpGroupProtocol.healthCheckDownRetry: Unhealthy threshold: number of consecutive health check failures before the backend server is blocked; defaults to 3, must be an integer between 2 and 5
CreateAppBlbIpGroupProtocol.healthCheckUpRetry: Healthy threshold: number of consecutive health check successes before the backend server is marked available again; defaults to 3, must be an integer between 2 and 5
CreateAppBlbIpGroupProtocol.healthCheckNormalStatus: HTTP status codes considered healthy during a health check; supports combinations of 5 status code classes, e.g. "http_1xx"
CreateAppBlbIpGroupProtocol.healthCheckHost: Host header of health check requests sent to the backend server, e.g. "localhost"; defaults to empty, effective when the health check protocol is "HTTP"
CreateAppBlbIpGroupProtocol.udpHealthCheckString: UDP health check string; required when the health check protocol is "UDP"
